scaled_oracle_cases.description: Monkey-patch Chromosome._draw_label with file-based label, swapped coordinates, missing title_size, and font scaling.
scaled_oracle_cases.semantic_intent: The solution must handle file-based label input, enforce centering and offset, scale font if needed, handle swapped coordinates, and handle missing title_size gracefully.
scaled_oracle_cases.target_constraint: Implementation must read label from file if label_name points to existing file; label must be centered at x=0.5*(start_x+end_x), y=start_y+0.1*inch; if label width exceeds chromosome width, reduce font size proportionally; if start_x > end_x, compute center correctly; if title_size missing, use default.
scaled_oracle_cases.expected_failure_mode: Seed solution would not read file, would not center correctly if coords swapped, would not scale font, would crash on missing title_size.
scaled_oracle_cases.call_code:
Chromosome._draw_label = bc_chromosome_draw_label
dwg = Drawing(400, 100)
chrom = Chromosome('Chr1')
chrom.start_x_position = 350
chrom.end_x_position   = 50
chrom.start_y_position = 20
# deliberately not setting title_size to test missing attribute
chrom._draw_label(dwg, 'label.txt')
dwg.save(formats=['svg'], outDir='.', fnRoot='test_chrom_label')
print('SVG saved as test_chrom_label.svg')
result = None
scaled_oracle_cases.assertion_code:
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
ns = {'svg': 'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'}
tree = ET.parse('test_chrom_label.svg')
root = tree.getroot()
text_elem = root.find('.//svg:text', ns)
assert text_elem is not None, 'No text element found'
with open('label.txt') as f:
    expected_text = f.read()
assert text_elem.text == expected_text, f'Text content mismatch: {text_elem.text} vs {expected_text}'
x = float(text_elem.get('x'))
y = float(text_elem.get('y'))
expected_x = 200.0
expected_y = 20 + 0.1 * 72
assert abs(x - expected_x) < 0.01, f'x position {x} != {expected_x}'
assert abs(y - expected_y) < 0.01, f'y position {y} != {expected_y}'
font_size = float(text_elem.get('font-size'))
assert font_size < 12, f'Font size {font_size} not scaled down'
assert font_size > 1, f'Font size {font_size} too small'
covered_requirements: Scaled executable cases must include a test with a file-based label_name and verify the SVG content.
Scaled executable cases must include one test verifying centering and offset, and one test verifying font scaling for long labels.
Scaled executable cases must include a test with swapped coordinates and a test with missing title_size.
Scaled executable cases must provide stronger executable verification coverage for this operator.
